description: This file defines the 'Defect' entity class used in a defect management system. It maps to a database table and contains fields like severity, status, description, reporting details, and relationships to users and root cause analysis.

classes.name: Defect
classes.description: Entity class representing a defect report with various attributes and relationships.

methods.name: preUpdate
methods.description: Lifecycle callback to update 'updatedAt' timestamp before entity update.

methods.name: getId
methods.description: Returns the unique identifier of the defect.

methods.name: getTitle
methods.description: Returns the title of the defect.

methods.name: setTitle
methods.description: Sets the title of the defect.

methods.name: getDescription
methods.description: Returns the description of the defect.

methods.name: setDescription
methods.description: Sets the description of the defect.

methods.name: getSeverity
methods.description: Returns the severity level of the defect.

methods.name: setSeverity
methods.description: Sets the severity level of the defect.

methods.name: getStatus
methods.description: Returns the current status of the defect.

methods.name: setStatus
methods.description: Sets the status of the defect.

methods.name: getReportedDate
methods.description: Returns the date when the defect was reported.

methods.name: setReportedDate
methods.description: Sets the reported date of the defect.

methods.name: getLocation
methods.description: Returns the location related to the defect.

methods.name: setLocation
methods.description: Sets the location related to the defect.

methods.name: getProductLine
methods.description: Returns the product line associated with the defect.

methods.name: setProductLine
methods.description: Sets the product line related to the defect.

methods.name: getReportedBy
methods.description: Returns the user who reported the defect.

methods.name: setReportedBy
methods.description: Sets the user who reported the defect.

methods.name: getAssignedTo
methods.description: Returns the user assigned to the defect.

methods.name: setAssignedTo
methods.description: Sets the user assigned to the defect.

methods.name: getCreatedAt
methods.description: Returns the timestamp when defect record was created.

methods.name: getUpdatedAt
methods.description: Returns the timestamp when defect was last updated.

methods.name: getRca
methods.description: Returns the associated root cause analysis entity.

methods.name: setRca
methods.description: Sets the root cause analysis entity.
